title: Un Per Solla Aasai Than Lyrics Minsara Kanna
stanzas: <div>Un Per Solla Aasaithan Lyrics Minsara Kanna

Un Paer solla aasaithaan
ullam uruga aasaithaan

Un Paer solla aasaithaan
ullam uruga aasaithaan
uyiril karaiya aasaithaan
aasaithaan unmel aasaithaan(2)

unthol sera aasaithaan
unnil vazha aasaithaan
unakkul udhaya aasaithaan
ulagam marakka aasaithaan
ondrum ondrum ondraai
aaga aasaithaan

Kannil kadai kannil
neeyum paarthaal podhume
kaalgal endhan kaalgal
kadhal kolam podume

naanam kondu megam
ondril maraiyum nilavena
koondhal kondu mugathai
neeyum moodum azhagenna

Neeyum ennai pirindhaal
endhan piravi mudiyume
meendum vandhu serndhaal
maru piravi thodarume

neeyum kovil aanaal
silaiyin vadivil varugiren
neeyum deepam aanaal
oliyum naane aagiren

kaala karaindha pinnum
koondhal naraitha pinnum
anbil maatram illaiye

ullam uruga aasaithaan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, highlighting the emotional connection between two individuals.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the movie Minsara Kanna.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Hariharan and Sujatha Mohan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by Deva.

When was this song released?

This song was released on September 9, 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Un Per Solla Aasai Than, the protagonists express their heartfelt emotions through a captivating melody that resonates with the theme of love. The song beautifully conveys the longing and affection that one feels for their beloved, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. With its soothing tunes and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This timeless piece from Minsara Kanna continues to touch the hearts of listeners, reminding them of the beauty of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Un Per Solla Aasai Than from Minsara Kanna is a timeless romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Hariharan and Sujatha Mohan, this song resonates with anyone who has ever experienced the magic of affection. The soulful composition by Deva adds a unique charm, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: I have a desire to say your name, Minsara Kanna.
I have a desire to say your name, my heart is melting with desire.
I have a desire to say your name, my heart is melting with desire, I have a desire to embrace you, I have a desire for you.
I have a desire to say your name, I have a desire to live in you, I have a desire to rise within you, I have a desire to make the world forget, I have a desire for you to be everything.
I have a desire to say your name...
If you look into my eyes, it’s enough, my feet will dance in love.
With my pride, I will gather clouds and become the moon, you will close your face with beauty.
In my sleep, I have a reason to say your name, it’s love that speaks.
Even Brahma is a poet because he created you.
I have a desire to say your name...
If you separate from me, my life will end, if you come back, it will continue again.
If you are a temple, I will come as a statue, if you are a lamp, I will become the light.
Without the sky, there is no love for us here.
Even after time passes, there is no change in love.
I have a desire to say your name, my heart is melting with desire.
I have a desire to say your name, I have a desire to live in you, I have a desire to rise within you, I have a desire to make the world forget, I have a desire for you to be everything.
I have a desire for you, I have a desire for you.
